name: Bin Request/Replacement
description: Request for new, replacement, or repaired bin
checks: What is the issue (damaged, stolen, new service)?

response_templates.bin_replacement: A replacement bin will be delivered to {address} within 5 business days.
response_templates.new_service: Your new waste service at {address} will be set up within 10 business days.
response_templates.bin_repair: A bin repair has been scheduled for {address}.
